expand.name: expand
expand.profiler_coverage: FULL — msprof all 3 routes (repeat=3, warmup=200, loops=100)

limitations.description: PyPTO uses torch.expand().clone() workaround (was 16384× AICPU dispatch, now 1 materialize kernel). ~33600x improvement in RC-3.
Per-row AICPU dispatch originally ~3000 us. RC-3: torch.expand().clone() 33600x improvement.

release_notes.rc3_fix: Replaced per-row AICPU dispatch loop with single torch.expand().clone() materialize call. 16384 kernel launches → 1. ~33600x faster.

release_notes.rc3_fix: Implemented FP32 accumulation via wrapper-level cast. 70/70 PASS (was 21/70 FP16 accum).
release_notes.post_rc3_fix: Added dedicated Ascend C FP32 accumulation kernel: Cast FP16→FP32 → ReduceSum<float> → Cast FP16. 70/70 PASS. Accuracy 3.5× better than FP16.

Auto-tiling FC4000 broken. 4D JIT compile timeout for large shapes.

release_notes.post_rc3_change: Multi-core batch dispatch: 1 kernel call, blockDim=12..20, per-core matrix loop

post_rc3_fixes.fix_matmul_multicore_batch: MatMul: 从 12-384 串行 kernel → 1 多核并行。B=32: 9521→37µs (257×), TFLOPS 0.17→43.53
post_rc3_fixes.fix_reduce_sum_fp32_kernel: ReduceSum: 新增 Ascend C FP32 累积内核, FP16→FP32→ReduceSum→FP16, 精度 3.5× 提升
post_rc3_fixes.fix_add_correctness_reference: Add: 参考数据改用 FP16 链式累积, 77/77 位精确 PASS
post_rc3_fixes.fix_dashboard_chinese: Dashboard 全面中文化, 含算子现状、性能数据、问题列表

known_limitations.description: Uses bitwise_or (no logical_or API). Correct for 0/1 bool.
FP16 accum precision exceeds atol=0.01 for 384-element reduction (21/70). FP32 accum kernel available (70/70).
N=32 limits Cube utilization to ~48%. Torch faster at B≥16.
Auto-tiling FC4000 broken. 4D JIT compile timeout for large shapes.
Per-row AICPU dispatch originally ~3000 us. RC-3: torch.expand().clone() 33600x improvement.
B=64 performance 9245us vs Torch 2180us — needs optimization.
B=64 performance 5050us vs Torch 135us — GetValue/SetValue bottleneck.
